purpose: Pre-commit hook installer / uninstaller for the AI_UNDERSTANDING contract. Copies cli/aiu-precommit.js into the target repo's .git/hooks/ so the hook is self-contained per-repo and survives extension version bumps. Backs up any pre-existing user pre-commit hook and restores it on uninstall.
invariants: A pre-existing user pre-commit hook is backed up to pre-commit.aiu-backup before our hook is installed — never overwritten without backup.
isHookInstalled returns true only when the file exists AND contains HOOK_MARKER — distinguishes our hook from arbitrary user content.
uninstallHook restores the backup if present, otherwise removes our hook outright; never leaves the repo without a hook by accident if the user had one.
The driver script (aiu-precommit.js) is copied into .git/hooks/ rather than referenced from the extension install path — survives extension reinstall/update.
gotchas: fs.chmodSync is wrapped in try/catch — Windows does not honor the +x bit, but git-for-windows resolves the shebang anyway.
Does not handle .git as a worktree pointer file (`gitdir: ...`) — assumes plain .git directory. Worktree projects need extra work.
buildHookBody embeds the absolute driver path — if the project moves on disk, the hook breaks until reinstalled.
